## Summary

<!-- Explain what changed and why. Keep the pull request focused. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link an issue with "Closes #123", or write "None". -->

## Validation

<!-- List the commands and manual scenarios used to verify the change. -->

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes, or are not applicable
- [ ] Android or iOS integration testing was completed, or is not applicable

## Capture changes

<!-- For capture or stitching changes, include the platform, OS version, device type, app framework, and scroll-container type. Otherwise write "Not applicable". -->

## Screenshots or logs

<!-- Add redacted before/after screenshots or relevant logs when useful. Otherwise write "Not applicable". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-facing changes, or is not applicable
- [ ] No generated screenshots, credentials, private app data, or unrelated changes are included
- [ ] The change preserves existing public API behavior, or the breaking change is clearly documented
